title: 企业公告模板中英双语版
description: 产出一个企业公告模板的中英双语简版，要求语义保持一致，提供可直接使用的版本。包括常见的通知类型如公司政策调整、业务变更、重要通知等。

members.name: 文案策划
members.taskPrompt: 负责文字内容创作与品牌文案撰写

members.name: 视觉设计师

subtasks.title: 企业公告模板中英双语版
subtasks.description: 产出一个企业公告模板的中英双语简版，要求语义保持一致，提供可直接使用的版本。包括常见的通知类型如公司政策调整、业务变更、重要通知等。

result.summary:
系统校验：子任务总数 1，已完成 1，失败 0，未完成 0。
已成功完成企业公告模板中英双语版的制作。交付物包含6大类企业公告模板：政策调整公告、业务变更公告、重要通知、放假通知、人事变动公告、办公地址变更通知。每个模板均提供中文和英文版本，语义保持一致，格式规范，可直接使用。
result.deliverables:
# 企业公告模板中英双语版 / Corporate Announcement Templates (Bilingual Edition)

---

## 一、政策调整公告 / Policy Adjustment Notice

### 模板一：常规政策调整

**【中文版】**
> **关于[政策名称]调整的通知**
>
> 尊敬的各位同事/客户：
>
> 为进一步提升[管理效率/服务质量/用户体验]，现对我司[相关政策]进行调整，具体变更内容如下：
>
> **一、调整内容**
> 1. [第一条调整内容]
> 2. [第二条调整内容]
> 3. [第三条调整内容]
>
> **二、生效时间**
> 自[YYYY年MM月DD日]起正式生效。
>
> **三、补充说明**
> [如有其他说明事项]
>
> 如有疑问，请联系：[联系人] / [联系方式]
>
> 感谢您的理解与支持！
>
> [公司名称]
> [发布日期]

---

> **Notice on Adjustment of [Policy Name]**
>
> Dear All / Dear Valued Customers:
>
> To further improve [management efficiency/service quality/user experience], we have made adjustments to our [relevant policy]. The specific changes are as follows:
>
> **I. Adjustment Details**
> 1. [First adjustment]
> 2. [Second adjustment]
> 3. [Third adjustment]
>
> **II. Effective Date**
> Effective from [YYYY-MM-DD].
>
> **III. Additional Notes**
> [Other relevant information if any]
>
> Should you have any questions, please contact: [Contact Person] / [Contact Information]
>
> Thank you for your understanding and support!
>
> [Company Name]
> [Date]

---

### 模板二：福利/制度政策调整

**【中文版】**
> **关于[假期制度/福利政策/考勤规定]优化的公告**
>
> 各位同事：
>
> 为更好地保障员工权益，提升企业文化关怀，现对公司[现行制度]进行优化升级，具体如下：
>
> **调整要点：**
> - [调整项1：具体内容]
> - [调整项2：具体内容]
> - [调整项3：具体内容]
>
> **执行时间：** [YYYY年MM月DD日]
>
> 详情请查阅公司内部网[相关链接]或咨询HR部门。
>
> 特此通知。
>
> [公司名称]
> [发布日期]

---

> **Notice on Optimization of [Leave Policy/Benefit/Attendance Rules]**
>
> Dear Colleagues:
>
> To better protect employee rights and enhance corporate culture care, we have optimized and upgraded our [current policy] as follows:
>
> **Key Changes:**
> - [Change 1: Details]
> - [Change 2: Details]
> - [Change 3: Details]
>
> **Implementation Date:** [YYYY-MM-DD]
>
> For details, please visit the company intranet [link] or contact the HR department.
>
> Please be advised accordingly.
>
> [Company Name]
> [Date]

---

## 二、业务变更公告 / Business Change Notice

### 模板一：业务调整/产品变更

**【中文版】**
> **关于[产品/服务]变更的通知**
>
> 尊敬的[客户/用户]：
>
> 感谢您一直以来对[公司/产品]的支持与信任。基于业务发展需要，我司将对[相关业务]进行调整，具体如下：
>
> **一、变更内容**
> 1. **服务调整：** [具体调整内容]
> 2. **功能更新：** [新增/优化功能]
> 3. **价格调整：** [如有价格变动]
>
> **二、时间安排**
> - 变更生效日期：[YYYY年MM月DD日]
> - 过渡期安排：[如有]
>
> **三、影响说明**
> [说明对用户的影响及应对措施]
>
> 如您对上述变更有任何疑问，欢迎致电[服务热线]或咨询在线客服。
>
> 再次感谢您的理解与支持！
>
> [公司名称]
> [发布日期]

---

> **Notice on Changes to [Product/Service]**
>
> Dear [Customers/Users]:
>
> Thank you for your continuous support and trust in [Company/Product]. Due to business development needs, we will make the following adjustments to our [relevant business]:
>
> **I. Change Details**
> 1. **Service Adjustment:** [Specific adjustment]
> 2. **Feature Update:** [New/Enhanced features]
> 3. **Price Adjustment:** [If applicable]
>
> **II. Timeline**
> - Effective Date: [YYYY-MM-DD]
> - Transition Period: [If any]
>
> **III. Impact**
> [Explanation of impact on users and countermeasures]
>
> Should you have any questions, please call our service hotline [number] or contact our online customer service.
>
> Thank you once again for your understanding and support!
>
> [Company Name]
> [Date]

---

### 模板二：业务暂停/终止

**【中文版】**
> **关于暂停[某项业务]服务的公告**
>
> 尊敬的客户：
>
> 因[原因：系统升级/战略调整/合作变更等]，我司将于[时间]起暂停[具体业务]服务。现将相关事项通知如下：
>
> **一、暂停时间**
> 自[YYYY年MM月DD日]起，恢复时间将另行通知。
>
> **二、影响范围**
> [说明受影响的服务内容]
>
> **三、客户权益保障**
> - [已购产品/服务处理方案]
> - [退款/补偿安排]
>
> 如有紧急需求，请联系[联系方式]。
>
> 对于给您带来的不便，我们深表歉意，敬请谅解。
>
> [公司名称]
> [发布日期]

---

> **Notice on Suspension of [Specific Business] Service**
>
> Dear Customers:
>
> Due to [reasons: system upgrade/strategic adjustment/partner change, etc.], we will suspend [specific business] service from [date]. The relevant matters are hereby notified as follows:
>
> **I. Suspension Period**
> From [YYYY-MM-DD] until further notice.
>
> **II. Affected Scope**
> [Description of affected services]
>
> **III. Customer Rights Protection**
> - [Handling of purchased products/services]
> - [Refund/Compensation arrangements]
>
> For urgent needs, please contact [contact information].
>
> We sincerely apologize for any inconvenience caused and ask for your understanding.
>
> [Company Name]
> [Date]

---

## 三、重要通知 / Important Notice

### 模板一：通用重要通知

**【中文版】**
> **重要通知**
>
> 全体员工/各位客户：
>
> 现将重要事项通知如下：
>
> **一、通知事项**
> [具体通知内容]
>
> **二、执行要求**
> 1. [要求一]
> 2. [要求二]
>
> **三、时间要求**
> 请于[YYYY年MM月DD日][时间]前完成[具体事项]。
>
> **四、联系人**
> 姓名：[XXX]
> 电话：[XXX]
> 邮箱：[XXX]
>
> 请高度重视，相互转告。
>
> [公司名称]
> [发布日期]

---

> **Important Notice**
>
> All Employees / Dear Customers:
>
> The following important matters are hereby notified:
>
> **I. Notice Details**
> [Specific content]
>
> **II. Requirements**
> 1. [Requirement 1]
> 2. [Requirement 2]
>
> **III. Timeline**
> Please complete [specific task] before [YYYY-MM-DD] [time].
>
> **IV. Contact Person**
> Name: [XXX]
> Phone: [XXX]
> Email: [XXX]
>
> Please treat this matter with high priority and spread the word.
>
> [Company Name]
> [Date]

---

### 模板二：紧急通知

**【中文版】**
> **紧急通知**
>
> 各位同事/客户：
>
> [紧急事项描述]，请立即响应：
>
> **[具体行动要求]**
>
> **生效时间：** 立即生效 / [具体时间]
>
> **联系方式：** [紧急联系人及方式]
>
> 如有疑问，请随时联系[负责人]。
>
> [公司名称]
> [发布日期]

---

> **Urgent Notice**
>
> Dear Colleagues / Customers:
>
> [Description of urgent matter], your immediate response is required:
>
> **[Specific Action Required]**
>
> **Effective Time:** Immediately / [Specific time]
>
> **Contact:** [Emergency contact and method]
>
> Should you have any questions, please contact [person in charge] at any time.
>
> [Company Name]
> [Date]

---

## 四、放假通知 / Holiday Notice

**【中文版】**
> **关于[节假日]放假安排的通知**
>
> 各位同事：
>
> 根据国家法定假日相关规定，结合公司实际情况，现将[20XX年][节假日]放假安排通知如下：
>
> **一、放假时间**
> [YYYY年MM月DD日]至[YYYY年MM月DD日]，共[XX]天。
>
> **二、返岗时间**
> [YYYY年MM月DD日]（星期X）正常上班。
>
> **三、注意事项**
> 1. 请各部门在放假前完成[相关工作安排]
> 2. 值班安排：[如有]
> 3. 紧急联系人：[XXX联系方式]
>
> 祝大家[节假日快乐/阖家幸福]！
>
> [公司名称]
> [发布日期]

---

> **Holiday Notice for [Holiday Name]**
>
> Dear Colleagues:
>
> According to the national holiday regulations and our company's actual situation, the holiday arrangement for [20XX] [Holiday] is hereby notified as follows:
>
> **I. Holiday Period**
> From [YYYY-MM-DD] to [YYYY-MM-DD], totaling [XX] days.
>
> **II. Return to Work**
> Normal work resumes on [YYYY-MM-DD] ([Day of Week]).
>
> **III. Notes**
> 1. Please complete [relevant work arrangements] before the holiday
> 2. On-duty arrangement: [If any]
> 3. Emergency contact: [XXX]
>
> Wish you all a happy holiday!
>
> [Company Name]
> [Date]

---

## 五、人事变动公告 / Personnel Change Notice

**【中文版】**
> **人事变动公告**
>
> 全体员工：
>
> 经公司研究决定，现对以下人员进行人事调整：
>
> **一、任命/调整**
> - [姓名] 任[部门][职位]，免去其原[职位]
> - [姓名] 调任[部门][职位]
>
> **二、生效日期**
> 自[YYYY年MM月DD日]起执行。
>
> **三、职责说明**
> [新增岗位职责描述]
>
> 请相关部门和人员配合做好工作交接，确保业务平稳过渡。
>
> 特此通知。
>
> [公司名称]
> [发布日期]

---

> **Personnel Change Notice**
>
> All Employees:
>
> Upon the company's decision, the following personnel adjustments are hereby announced:
>
> **I. Appointment/Adjustment**
> - [Name] is appointed as [Position] in [Department], and removed from the original position
> - [Name] is transferred to [Position] in [Department]
>
> **II. Effective Date**
> Effective from [YYYY-MM-DD].
>
> **III. Responsibilities**
> [Description of new job responsibilities]
>
> Relevant departments and personnel are requested to cooperate in work handover to ensure smooth business transition.
>
> Please be advised accordingly.
>
> [Company Name]
> [Date]

---

## 六、办公地址变更 / Office Relocation Notice

**【中文版】**
> **关于公司办公地址变更的通知**
>
> 尊敬的客户、合作伙伴及各界朋友：
>
> 因公司业务发展需要，我司将于[日期]起搬迁至新址办公，现将有关事宜通知如下：
>
> **一、新办公地址**
> [详细地址，含省市区路名及门牌号]
>
> **二、联系方式**
> - 电话：[XXX-XXXXXXXX]
> - 传真：[XXX-XXXXXXXX]
> - 邮编：[XXXXXX]
>
> **三、搬迁时间**
> [YYYY年MM月DD日]至[YYYY年MM月DD日]
>
> **四、注意事项**
> 搬迁期间[可能存在的服务影响及应对措施]
>
> 因搬迁给您带来的不便，敬请谅解。我们将继续为您提供优质的服务！
>
> [公司名称]
> [发布日期]

---

> **Notice on Office Relocation**
>
> Dear Customers, Partners and Friends:
>
> Due to our business development needs, we will relocate to a new office on [date]. The relevant matters are hereby notified as follows:
>
> **I. New Office Address**
> [Full address including province, city, district, street name and building number]
>
> **II. Contact Information**
> - Tel: [XXX-XXXXXXXX]
> - Fax: [XXX-XXXXXXXX]
> - Postal Code: [XXXXXX]
>
> **III. Relocation Timeline**
> From [YYYY-MM-DD] to [YYYY-MM-DD]
>
> **IV. Notes**
> [Potential service impact during relocation and countermeasures]
>
> We sincerely apologize for any inconvenience caused by the relocation. We will continue to provide you with quality service!
>
> [Company Name]
> [Date]

---

**使用说明：** 模板中方括号"[ ]"内容为可替换字段，请根据实际情况填写后使用。

# 企业公告模板 / Corporate Announcement Templates
## 中英双语简版 / Bilingual Edition

---

## 一、政策调整公告 / Policy Adjustment Notice

### 【模板一：常规政策调整】

**【中文版】**

> **关于[政策名称]调整的通知**
>
> 尊敬的各位同事/客户：
>
> 为进一步提升[管理效率/服务质量/用户体验]，现对我司[相关政策]进行调整，具体变更内容如下：
>
> **一、调整内容**
> 1. [第一条调整内容]
> 2. [第二条调整内容]
> 3. [第三条调整内容]
>
> **二、生效时间**
> 自[YYYY年MM月DD日]起正式生效。
>
> **三、补充说明**
> [如有其他说明事项]
>
> 如有疑问，请联系：[联系人] / [联系方式]
>
> 感谢您的理解与支持！
>
> [公司名称]
> [发布日期]

---

> **Notice on Adjustment of [Policy Name]**
>
> Dear All / Dear Valued Customers:
>
> To further improve [management efficiency/service quality/user experience], we have made adjustments to our [relevant policy]. The specific changes are as follows:
>
> **I. Adjustment Details**
> 1. [First adjustment]
> 2. [Second adjustment]
> 3. [Third adjustment]
>
> **II. Effective Date**
> Effective from [YYYY-MM-DD].
>
> **III. Additional Notes**
> [Other relevant information if any]
>
> Should you have any questions, please contact: [Contact Person] / [Contact Information]
>
> Thank you for your understanding and support!
>
> [Company Name]
> [Date]

---

**【中文版】**

> **关于[假期制度/福利政策/考勤规定]优化的公告**
>
> 各位同事：
>
> 为更好地保障员工权益，提升企业文化关怀，现对公司[现行制度]进行优化升级，具体如下：

> - [调整项2：具体内容]

>

>
> 详情请查阅公司内部网[相关链接]或咨询HR部门。
>

>
> [公司名称]

> **Notice on Optimization of [Leave Policy/Benefit/Attendance Rules]**
>
> Dear Colleagues:
>
> To better protect employee rights and enhance corporate culture care, we have optimized and upgraded our [current policy] as follows:

> **Key Changes:**

## 二、业务变更公告 / Business Change Notice

### 【模板一：业务调整/产品变更】

## 三、重要通知 / Important Notice

### 【模板一：通用重要通知】

**【中文版】**

> **重要通知**
>

>
